description: ETasmania, abashayeli abafundile kanye nabashayeli besikhashana kumele bangabi ne-BAC ngenkathi beshayela.
Uma kunemvula, yehlisa isivinini bese wandisa ibanga elilandelanayo ngoba imigwaqo ingaba bushelelezi futhi ukubonakala kwayo kungancipha.
Abashayeli kumele behlise ijubane futhi bavumele izimoto eziphuthumayo zibonise izibani ezikhanyayo noma izinhlabamkhosi.
Ungashayeli uma utshwala, izidakamizwa, ukukhathala, ukugula noma imithi kungathinta ikhono lakho lokushayela ngokuphepha.
Ukubheka phambili, ukuhlola izibuko nokuskena izingozi kusiza abashayeli ukuthi basabele ngokuphephile ezimweni zomgwaqo ezishintshayo.
Vumela indawo eyengeziwe eduze kwezimoto ezisindayo futhi ugweme ukushayela ezindaweni lapho ungazazi khona.
Izimoto nama-trailer kumele ahlale ngaphakathi kwemingcele yomthwalo osemthethweni kanye nokudonsa, futhi imithwalo kumele iboshwe kahle.
Uphawu oluthi AKUKHO UKUJIKA kwe-U lusho ukuthi abashayeli abavunyelwe ukujika kwe-U kuleyo ndawo.
Ukupaka akuvunyelwe eduze kakhulu nezindawo zokuhlangana kwemigwaqo, izindawo zokuwela abahamba ngezinyawo kanye nezibani zomgwaqo ngaphandle kokuthi izimpawu zikuvumela.
Abashayeli kumele banikeze ithuba abahambi ngezinyawo lapho bewela futhi lapho bephenduka umgwaqo abahambi ngezinyawo bayawela.
Amaphoyisa aseTasmania angenza ukuhlolwa kokuphefumula okungahleliwe futhi abashayeli kumele banikeze isampula yokuphefumula uma becelwa.
Izindawo zesikole eTasmania zivame ukusebenza ngesivinini esingamakhilomitha angama-40 ngehora ngezikhathi eziboniswe ezimpawini zezindawo zesikole.
Uma usemgqeni wokuma noma uphawu lwe-STOP, kufanele ume ngokuphelele bese uvumela indlela ngaphambi kokungena empambanweni yemigwaqo.
Shiya igebe elikhulu phakathi kwezimoto ezimweni ezimanzi ukuze uvumele ibanga elengeziwe lokubhuleka.
Gwema ukulandela amaloli eduze kakhulu ngoba anciphisa ukubonakala futhi adinga ibanga elithe xaxa lokuma.
Lalela imikhawulo yesivinini encishisiwe, izimpawu zesikhashana kanye nabalawuli bethrafikhi uma ushayela ezindaweni zokulungisa umgwaqo.
Imizila yamabhasi ingasetshenziswa kuphela yizimoto ezigunyaziwe ngaphandle kokuthi izimpawu zibonisa ukuthi kuvunyelwe ukungena.
Izindawo zokulayisha zigcinelwe imisebenzi egunyaziwe yokulayisha nokulayisha futhi imikhawulo isebenza kwezinye izimoto.
